Strawberry Cow Battle Royale

last cow standing wins


50%
latest changes:
- menu music! thrilling beats while you wait
- weapon attachment perks: Muzzle Boost, Trigger Job, Eco Mag, Split Chamber, Hollow Points, FMJ Rounds
- cowtank: 50% armor + bigger shield icon + clang sfx
- all projectiles 2x faster, benelli short range
- piercing rounds pass through 1 target
- random maps, portals, shrinking zone
- compact perk bar, spectate mode, 360 aim
